name: mvr-agent-wrapper-tools
description: Host-side narrow tool schemas that agents can map to the MVR API core routes. These wrappers do not expose private runtime logic. Public sandbox use is for non-commercial evaluation only; commercial use requires authorization from African Market OS. Outputs are advisory and not field-validated unless verified evidence is supplied.

tools.name: mvr_preflight_market_entry
tools.description: Preflight African or high-context market entry for trust, embeddedness, guardian approval, evidence gaps, and permission-to-operate before an agent recommends launch. Sandbox/evaluation use only; commercial use requires a license. Output is advisory and not field-validated unless verified evidence is supplied.

tools.name: mvr_preflight_mvp
tools.description: Check whether an MVP idea has enough relational readiness and local permission before build-first advice. Sandbox/evaluation use only; commercial use requires a license. Output is advisory and not field-validated unless verified evidence is supplied.

tools.name: mvr_investor_due_diligence
tools.description: Screen a venture for relational readiness, evidence sufficiency, guardian risk, and permission-to-operate before investor memo work. Sandbox/evaluation use only; commercial use requires a license. Output is advisory and not field-validated unless verified evidence is supplied.

tools.name: mvr_accelerator_screen
tools.description: Assess accelerator or cohort applicants for evidence gaps, local legitimacy, market belonging, and readiness for advisor review. Sandbox/evaluation use only; commercial use requires a license. Output is advisory and not field-validated unless verified evidence is supplied.

tools.name: mvr_partner_readiness
tools.description: Evaluate whether a partner, distributor, NGO, or enterprise relationship has enough trust, reciprocity, and permission to proceed. Sandbox/evaluation use only; commercial use requires a license. Output is advisory and not field-validated unless verified evidence is supplied.

tools.name: mvr_guardian_risk_scan
tools.description: Scan for regulator, community, distributor, channel, or institutional guardian risks that could block adoption or operations. Sandbox/evaluation use only; commercial use requires a license. Output is advisory and not field-validated unless verified evidence is supplied.

tools.name: mvr_evidence_gap_plan
tools.description: Identify missing proof needed before a high-context market recommendation can be considered evidence-bounded. Sandbox/evaluation use only; commercial use requires a license. Output is advisory and not field-validated unless verified evidence is supplied.

tools.name: mvr_abstention_check
tools.description: Determine whether the safest MVR answer is abstention, pilot-only, or a constrained recommendation because evidence is thin. Sandbox/evaluation use only; commercial use requires a license. Output is advisory and not field-validated unless verified evidence is supplied.

tools.name: mvr_market_permission_memo
tools.description: Generate a market-permission memo structure for trust, embeddedness, guardian approval, evidence gaps, and safe go/no-go framing. Sandbox/evaluation use only; commercial use requires a license. Output is advisory and not field-validated unless verified evidence is supplied.
